title: RSW CHRISTMAS 6 BINGO GAME CRACKERS XM6069
features: MEASUREMENTS: Each cracker measures: 9"/22cm. Material: Paper. Pack of 6.
WHAT'S INCLUDED: The box includes 6 Christmas Crackers, each cracker contains a hat, motto, and snap. Box contains 24 bingo game cards, a bingo bag, calling card, numbered markers and instructions.

BINGO: The perfect game to keep all your family entertained over the Christmas period. Simply draw the numbers from the bag and watch your family have a blast marking the numbers down. The looser is washing up after dinner!
FESTIVE: Featuring a stunning colourful design our crackers are sure to make any family member smile. Add the final Christmas touch to your dinner table.
ECO-FRIENDLY: Not only are our crackers a lot of fun they are environment friendly too with no plastic in sight you can simply recycle all your crackers and box.
